name: OCaml
description: OCaml via opam (mise has no first-class OCaml plugin). Installs opam, initializes an opam root at /usr/local/share/opam, and creates a switch with the requested compiler version.

version.description: OCaml compiler version for the default switch.

installDuneAndLsp.description: Install `dune`, `ocaml-lsp-server`, and `ocamlformat` into the default switch.
